title: French-Style Risotto with Beans
description: A creamy, flavorful risotto dish with a twist of French cuisine, featuring beans for added protein and fiber.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the pungent Italian risotto rice and cook, stirring constantly, for 1-2 minutes.
If using white wine, add it to the skillet and cook until the liquid is almost completely absorbed, stirring constantly.
Add 1/2 cup of warmed vegetable broth to the skillet and cook, stirring constantly, until the liquid is mostly absorbed.

Repeat the process of adding the broth in 1/2 cup increments, stirring constantly and allowing each portion to be absorbed before adding the next, until the rice is cooked and creamy, about 20-25 minutes.
Stir in the cooked white beans, Parmesan cheese, and chopped parsley.
Season the risotto with salt and pepper to taste.
